hypothesis: Switching the badge to a low-friction guarantee ('remove in 10 seconds') will outperform the current privacy message by reducing installation anxiety for hesitant visitors.

changes.hero_badge: ✅ Free forever. No account needed. Uninstall in 10 seconds.

rationale.hero_badge: Addresses installation anxiety — the #1 barrier to Chrome extension adoption. 'No account needed' removes data collection fears. 'Uninstall in 10 seconds' reduces perceived lock-in. Tests whether commitment-reduction messaging outperforms the privacy differentiator. This is the 'remove all barriers' hypothesis.

predicted_lift: +6% CTA click rate (especially first-time extension users)
